items.json._comment: Grow a Garden 2 crop database. 40 crops. tier uses GAG2 rarity (Super/Mythic/Legendary/Epic/Rare/Uncommon/Common/TBD). baseValue = 1kg sell value, used by the profit calculator.

items.name: Mega Seed (Variants — see mechanics/mega-moon.md)
items.description: A new seed variant introduced in the Mega Moon Update (2026-06-27). Creates a large version of any non-limited crop. Specific multiplier and value data not yet available. See mechanics/mega-moon.md for details.
items.howToGet: Mega Moon Event — a blue moon at night increases the chance to get Mega seeds.

items.name: Hypno Bloom
items.description: A Super-rarity multi-harvest crop added in Update 1.06.0 (June 27, 2026). Produces 2 fruits per plant. Has a crowd-control ability that disrupts intruder movement. Nearly 4x the value of Ghost Pepper at comparable weight.
items.howToGet: Buy from the Seed Shop for 150M Sheckles or 1,599 Robux. Restock chance ~0.275%. Updated Jun 28, 2026 per growagarden2wiki.net.

items.name: Moon Bloom
items.description: One of only two Super rarity crops in GAG2 (alongside Dragon's Breath). Astronomical seed cost (85M Sheckles) but extremely high returns. Endgame-only crop.
items.howToGet: Buy from the Seed Shop. Restock chance ~0.35% — extremely rare. Requires a maxed economy (Sprinklers, pets, defense).

items.name: Dragon's Breath
items.description: The most expensive seed in the game (225M Sheckles) and the other Super-rarity crop. Single harvest — each seed produces one high-value crop.
items.howToGet: Buy from the Seed Shop. Restock chance ~0.275% — extremely rare. Absolute endgame crop; needs extreme defense.

items.name: Lotus
items.description: A Mythic crop with excellent value (6,500 S/1kg) at a surprisingly low seed cost of just 899 Sheckles. Single harvest, but the value/seed ratio is extremely favorable (~7.2× ROI).
items.howToGet: Buy from the Seed Shop. Best value-per-Sheckle among high-tier crops — great candidate for mutation farming.

items.name: Venus Flytrap
items.description: A high-value single-harvest crop that also attacks thieves at night — a rare dual-purpose plant. Worth the premium seed cost.
items.howToGet: Buy from the Seed Shop or Defense Plant Shop. Restock chance ~1.43%.

items.name: Ghost Pepper
items.description: A Mythic multi-harvest crop obtained from the Ghost Pepper Pack (99💎 per roll, 1% drop). Multi-harvest makes it one of the best long-term Mythic investments.
items.howToGet: Roll the Ghost Pepper Pack in the Item Shop (99💎 per roll, 1% drop rate — rarest pack reward).

items.name: Beanstalk
items.description: A Robux-only Mythic crop with multi-harvest and good base value. Only purchasable with Robux (1,199💎), making it a premium seed.
items.howToGet: Purchase with Robux only (1,199💎). Not available for Sheckles.

items.name: Romanesco
items.description: THE best ROI crop in the game. A Mythic multi-harvest crop costing only 99 Sheckles per seed, producing 1,500 S at base weight — a 15× value/seed ratio. Likely the most under-priced seed in GAG2.
items.howToGet: Buy from the Seed Shop for just 99 Sheckles. One seed = infinite harvests.

items.name: Pomegranate
items.description: A Mythic multi-harvest crop. High seed cost (12M) but multi-harvest provides sustained income — a good late-game earner when paired with mutations.
items.howToGet: Buy from the Seed Shop. Restock chance ~0.9%.

items.name: Poison Apple
items.description: A Mythic single-harvest crop. High seed cost but 900 S base value, with possible defensive poison properties.
items.howToGet: Buy from the Seed Shop. Restock chance ~0.5%.

items.name: Horned Melon
items.description: A Mythic multi-harvest crop obtainable only from the Ghost Pepper Pack (30% drop).
items.howToGet: Roll the Ghost Pepper Pack in the Item Shop (99💎 per roll, 30% drop).

items.name: Sunflower
items.description: A Legendary multi-harvest crop, notable as the only crop that can receive the exclusive Dawnbound mutation (event-exclusive). A specialty crop for collectors and mutation farmers.
items.howToGet: Buy from the Seed Shop. Restock chance ~1.7%.

items.name: Poison Ivy
items.description: A Legendary multi-harvest crop at only 99 Sheckles per seed. Excellent value (17× ROI) with multi-harvest regrowth — one of the best early mid-game investments.
items.howToGet: Buy from the Seed Shop for 99 Sheckles. Also a 4% drop from the Ghost Pepper Pack.

items.name: Cherry
items.description: A Legendary multi-harvest crop. Mid-range Legendary entry point at 1.2M Sheckles with solid long-term value from regrowth.
items.howToGet: Buy from the Seed Shop. Restock chance ~2.2%.

items.name: Acorn
items.description: A Legendary multi-harvest crop.
items.howToGet: Buy from the Seed Shop. Restock chance ~2.9%.

items.name: Dragon Fruit
items.description: A popular Legendary crop — the first serious high-tier investment for transitioning from mid to late game. Reasonable seed cost (120K) with multi-harvest returns.
items.howToGet: Buy from the Seed Shop. Restock chance ~4%.

items.name: Mushroom
items.description: Has the highest base sell value of any crop in GAG2. Despite the 15K seed cost, its 13K base value at 1kg makes it a strong mid-game investment. Multi-harvest provides recurring income.
items.howToGet: Buy from the Seed Shop once you have 15K🪙 saved. Pair with Frozen (×40) or Electric (×70) mutations for extreme returns.

items.name: Glow Mushroom
items.description: An Epic multi-harvest crop obtainable only from the Ghost Pepper Pack (15% drop).
items.howToGet: Roll the Ghost Pepper Pack in the Item Shop (99💎 per roll, 15% drop, avg weight 7.00kg).

items.name: Mango
items.description: An Epic multi-harvest crop.
items.howToGet: Buy from the Seed Shop. Restock chance ~5%.

items.name: Coconut
items.description: An Epic multi-harvest crop with decent mid-game value.
items.howToGet: Buy from the Seed Shop. Restock chance ~5%.

items.name: Grape
items.description: An Epic multi-harvest crop.
items.howToGet: Buy from the Seed Shop. Restock chance ~6.6%.

items.name: Banana
items.description: An Epic multi-harvest crop. Reliable but unremarkable value for its cost.
items.howToGet: Buy from the Seed Shop. Restock chance ~9%.

items.name: Green Bean
items.description: The crop linked to the only active code (TEAMGREENBEAN). Despite Epic rarity, its base value (10 S) is low, but multi-harvest makes it a long-term passive earner.
items.howToGet: Buy from the Seed Shop, or redeem the code TEAMGREENBEAN for 3 free seeds. Restock chance ~15%.

items.name: Bamboo
items.description: The best early-to-mid game crop in GAG2. Priced at only 700 Sheckles, it produces 800 S of base value and can be planted densely — ideal for mutation farming.
items.howToGet: Buy from the Seed Shop for 700🪙. Plant densely in tight clusters and wait for weather mutations. Single harvest — replant immediately.

items.name: Baby Cactus
items.description: A Rare single-harvest crop from the Ghost Pepper Pack (50% drop — the most common pack reward). A smaller, cheaper version of Cactus.
items.howToGet: Roll the Ghost Pepper Pack in the Item Shop (99💎 per roll, 50% drop).

items.name: Cactus
items.description: A defensive crop that also produces income. Thieves get pricked trying to steal — a good early defensive plant.
items.howToGet: Buy from the Seed Shop or Defense Plant Shop. Restock chance ~10%.

items.name: Corn
items.description: A Rare multi-harvest crop recommended for stable mid-game income. Reliable returns between Bamboo cycling and saving up for Mushroom.
items.howToGet: Buy from the Seed Shop. Restock chance ~10%.

items.name: Pineapple
items.description: A Rare multi-harvest crop. A solid mid-game option with reliable multi-harvest income once you can afford the 10K seed cost.
items.howToGet: Buy from the Seed Shop. Restock chance ~8%.

items.name: Pumpkin
items.description: An Uncommon multi-harvest crop with a surprising 350 S base value. Excellent value for its ~34 Sheckle seed cost — one of the best early-game value crops.
items.howToGet: Buy from the Seed Shop. Restock chance ~15%.

items.name: Tulip
items.description: An Uncommon single-harvest crop. Good 60 S value at a cheap 40🪙 seed, but single harvest means replanting each time.
items.howToGet: Buy from the Seed Shop. Restock chance ~18%.

items.name: Apple
items.description: An Uncommon multi-harvest crop. A stepping stone between basic crops and more valuable mid-game options like Bamboo.
items.howToGet: Buy from the Seed Shop. Restock chance ~18%.

items.name: Tomato
items.description: An Uncommon multi-harvest crop. One of the recommended early purchases after Carrot — the next step up at 200 Sheckles.
items.howToGet: Buy from the Seed Shop. Restock chance ~20%.

items.name: Carrot
items.description: The cheapest seed in the game (1 Sheckle). Multi-harvest with a 5× value/seed cost ratio. The perfect starter crop.
items.howToGet: Buy from the Seed Shop for 1🪙. Restock chance ~30% — very common.

items.name: Blueberry
items.description: A Common multi-harvest crop. Slightly more expensive than Carrot (25 vs 1) but same base value — good for early diversification.
items.howToGet: Buy from the Seed Shop. Restock chance ~20%.

items.name: Strawberry
items.description: A Common multi-harvest crop with the lowest base value at 3 S/1kg. A quick starter crop.
items.howToGet: Buy from the Seed Shop. Restock chance ~25%.

items.name: Thorn Rose
items.description: A crop with unconfirmed rarity. Decent value, with possible defensive properties based on the thorn name.
items.howToGet: Buy from the Seed Shop for 229🪙. Mechanics still being researched.

items.name: Pinetree
items.description: A crop with unconfirmed rarity. Good base value (100 S) at a very low seed cost (99🪙). Status and mechanics TBD.
items.howToGet: Buy from the Seed Shop for 99🪙. Mechanics still being researched.

items.name: Venom Spitter
items.description: Mythic defensive plant that attacks thieves. Multi-harvest. Added in Aurora Event (2026-06-20). Seed costs ~30M Sheckles.
items.howToGet: Buy from Defense Plant Shop or Seed Shop. Aurora Event exclusive. Exact price TBD.

items.name: Fire Fern
items.description: A Legendary multi-harvest crop added in Update 1.13.0 (July 2026).
items.howToGet: Buy from the Seed Shop.

items.name: Rocket Pop
items.description: A Legendary single-harvest crop released on July 4, 2026 (Update 1.13.0).
items.howToGet: Buy from the Seed Shop.

items.name: Bone Blossom
items.description: An upcoming Legendary multi-harvest crop. Currently unreleased.
items.howToGet: Not currently obtainable.

items.name: Briar Rose
items.description: An unreleased Mythic multi-harvest crop with estimated base value of 4,000 S at 1kg.
items.howToGet: Not currently obtainable (admin/testing only).

items.name: Star Fruit
items.description: Super rarity crop added in Merging Update (Jul 13, 2026). Glows at night, strikes players with starlight every 5-10s, triggers Starfall mutation. Price 315M🪙/1,899💎. Multi-harvest. Listed in Seed Shop.
items.howToGet: Buy from the Seed Shop. Super rarity restock chance.

items.name: Sun Bloom
items.description: Super rarity crop added in Merging Update (Jul 13, 2026). Price 110M🪙/1,549💎. Multi-harvest. Can be merged with Moon Bloom to create Eclipse Bloom (both parents destroyed).
items.howToGet: Buy from the Seed Shop.

items.name: Eclipse Bloom
items.description: First Secret-rarity crop (new tier above Super). Multi-harvest. Cannot be bought — obtained by merging Sun Bloom + Moon Bloom (both destroyed). Added Jul 13, 2026.
items.howToGet: Merge Sun Bloom (110M🪙) + Moon Bloom (85M🪙). Both parents are consumed.
